name: Notion Knowledge Base AI Assistant
description: Searches a Notion knowledge base for relevant pages matching a user question, retrieves their content, uses Claude AI to synthesize an accurate answer grounded in the Notion content, and posts the answer to Slack with Block Kit formatting and source citations.

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for searching and reading pages

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the answer

question.description: The user's question to answer from the Notion knowledge base

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

steps.name: Search Notion pages matching the question
Extract page IDs and titles from search results
Fetch block children for each page
Compile all Notion page content into text
Build Claude prompt for knowledge base Q&A
Run Claude AI knowledge base Q&A
